build.blocker_summary: npm run build fails with PWA/vite-plugin-pwa workbox-build error: 'Unable to write the service worker file. Unfinished hook action(s) on exit: (terser) renderChunk.' Pre-existing infra issue; not caused by BRAND-SIGNAL-WO code.

cta-validator.evidence: Commerce CTA grep (Shop Now|Buy Now|Add to Cart) on src/pages/ and src/components/: 0 matches. Create Campaign in BrandIntelligenceHub routes to /brand/campaigns/new?signal_id= (intelligence-first, no commerce on intelligence surface).

hub-shell-detector.evidence: BrandIntelligenceHub: useIntelligence, useBrandTier, CrossHubActionDispatcher; data hooks and actions present. No new shells introduced; signal→campaign journey wired.

note: WO implementation complete. Signal→Create Campaign journey: BrandIntelligenceHub uses CrossHubActionDispatcher with hubContext=brand; Create Campaign navigates to /brand/campaigns/new?signal_id=<id> with state.fromSignal. Business create_campaign route fixed from /portal/marketing-hub/campaigns/new to /portal/marketing/campaigns/new. Gate FAIL due to pre-existing PWA/terser build error; unblock when build infra fixed.
